message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}

participant "系统用户" as U
participant "问卷系统" as S
participant "受调查者" as R

U -> S : 请求创建问卷
S -> U : 发送验证码验证用户
U -> S : 验证通过后创建问卷

activate S
S -> S : 创建问卷
deactivate S

S -> R : 生成问卷网址和二维码
R -> S : 回答问卷
U -> S : 查看问卷答卷
@enduml
